title: Flaky Smoky Lamb Mince Wraps
description: This smoky and flaky lamb mince wrap is a low-calorie-friendly brunch dish that blends Ukrainian flavors with savory ingredients for an easy-to-make meal.
instructions: Mix ground lamb, salt, pepper, garlic powder, and smoked paprika in a bowl. Set aside.
In a small pan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add minced onion and sauté for about 2 minutes until soft and translucent.
Add the ground lamb mixture to the onion and gently cook for another minute. Remove from heat and let it cool slightly.
Beat egg white in a separate bowl until frothy. Gradually fold the cooled meat mixture into the beaten egg white, adding flour as needed to prevent sticking.
Shape the filling into 4 small balls using your hands or spoon. Place each ball on a vegetable wrap and wrap tightly by rolling from one end to another.
Place wraps in a greased baking dish. Brush with olive oil if desired. Bake for about 8-10 minutes until golden brown and slightly crispy around the edges.
Serve hot as a breakfast or snack option.
